entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A globally consumed legume valued for its nutrition and affordability.

entities.name: COLD PLASMA
entities.description: An innovative nonthermal technology used to improve food safety and quality by inactivating microorganisms and reducing chemical contaminants.

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: A fungus used to inoculate groundnuts to study aflatoxin contamination.

entities.name: AFLATOXIN B1
entities.description: A chemical contaminant produced by Aspergillus flavus that is reduced by cold plasma treatment.

entities.name: PROTEIN
entities.description: A nutritional component of groundnuts enhanced by cold plasma treatment.

entities.name: FAT
entities.description: A nutritional component of groundnuts enhanced by cold plasma treatment.

entities.name: FIBRE
entities.description: A nutritional component of groundnuts enhanced by cold plasma treatment.

entities.name: PHENOLICS
entities.description: Bioactive compounds in groundnuts enhanced by cold plasma treatment.

entities.name: FLAVONOIDS
entities.description: Bioactive compounds in groundnuts enhanced by cold plasma treatment.

entities.name: MINERAL BIOAVAILABILITY
entities.description: The extent to which minerals are absorbed, enhanced by cold plasma treatment.

entities.name: PHYTATES
entities.description: An anti-nutritional factor in groundnuts decreased by cold plasma treatment.

entities.name: OXALATES
entities.description: An anti-nutritional factor in groundnuts decreased by cold plasma treatment.

entities.name: TANNINS
entities.description: An anti-nutritional factor in groundnuts decreased by cold plasma treatment.

entities.name: NUTRIENT DIGESTIBILITY
entities.description: The ease with which nutrients are digested, improved by the reduction of anti-nutritional factors.

entities.name: FOOD SAFETY
entities.description: The state of food being safe for consumption, improved by cold plasma treatment.

entities.name: FOOD QUALITY
entities.description: The overall characteristics and nutritional value of food, improved by cold plasma treatment.

relationships.description: Treatment applied to improve quality and safety
Inoculated into groundnuts to induce contamination
Significantly reduces levels of the contaminant
Improves overall safety by reducing contaminants
Improves overall quality by enhancing nutrition
